title: Rubric Generator
description: Build a scoring rubric for an assignment with clear criteria and performance levels.
template: Help me build a grading rubric. Ask me for the assignment type, grade level, and the 3-5 things I most want to assess if I haven't said them yet. Then produce a rubric table with those criteria as rows and 4 performance levels as columns (e.g., Exemplary / Proficient / Developing / Beginning), with a short description in each cell.
